name: iubenda
description: iubenda — Privacy policy and cookie consent compliance platform supporting GDPR, CCPA, and LGPD with multi-language output.

seo.title: iubenda — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: iubenda: iubenda — Privacy policy and cookie consent compliance platform supporting GDPR, CCPA, and LGPD with multi-language output.

when_to_use: Auto-generated GDPR privacy policy in 11 languages
CCPA-compliant cookie consent and opt-out mechanism
Cookie policy banner with IAB TCF 2.0 framework support
Consent proof storage for LGPD compliance in Brazil
Privacy policy API for headless and mobile app deployments

pros: Clause library covers unusual business scenarios
Embeds update automatically when laws change
Supports policies for GDPR, CCPA, LGPD in many languages
cons: Policies hosted on iubenda by default, not on your domain
Pro features stack up — total cost can surprise
Cookie banner less feature-rich than dedicated CMPs
Customization limited compared to custom legal drafting
review.verdict: The default pick for self-serve privacy policies with legal backing — expensive once you add every add-on.
review.best_for: Global SaaS and ecommerce needing attorney-grade policies without a lawyer
review.not_for: Large publishers that need enterprise CMP plus custom legal counsel

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
